ABS_PORT.description: Port for the Audiobookshelf web UI + API

ABS_ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Audiobookshelf root admin password — auto-generated. ServiceBay calls /init after deploy to skip the first-launch wizard.

TZ.description: Timezone (used for podcast download schedules + Jellyfin metadata)

ABS_AUDIOBOOKS_PATH.description: Host path to your audiobook library. Defaults to the file-share Samba volume. Folder name is lowercase by convention (matches `notes/` + `podcasts/` siblings) per #1018.

ABS_PODCASTS_PATH.description: Host path where Audiobookshelf will download podcast episodes. Lowercase by convention — see #1018.

ABS_OIDC_SECRET.description: OIDC client secret for Audiobookshelf ↔ Authelia. Auto-generated; surfaced in the install log so you can paste it into ABS Settings → Authentication → OIDC.

JELLYFIN_PORT.description: Port for the Jellyfin web UI + API

JELLYFIN_ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Jellyfin admin password — auto-generated. ServiceBay walks the first-run wizard via the /Startup/* API after deploy so first login works. Family members can either share this account, get their own via Settings → Users, or you enable jellyfin-plugin-sso later for Authelia SSO.

JELLYFIN_MEDIA_PATH.description: Host path mounted at /media (read-only). Defaults to the file-share volume so Music/, Movies/, TV/ etc. dropped into the Samba share appear in Jellyfin's library scan.

PUBLIC_DOMAIN.description: Public domain (used to build the JELLYFIN_PublishedServerUrl env that mobile apps probe for backend URLs).

LLDAP_LDAP_PORT.description: LLDAP LDAP-protocol port — Jellyfin's LDAP-Auth plugin binds LLDAP here for SSO (#1718). Inherited from the auth template.

LLDAP_BASE_DN.description: LLDAP base DN (e.g. dc=dopp,dc=cloud) — Jellyfin's LDAP-Auth plugin search base. Inherited from the auth template.

LLDAP_ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: LLDAP admin password — Jellyfin's LDAP-Auth plugin uses it as the bind DN for user lookup (#1718). Inherited from the auth template when both are installed together.

MEDIA_SUBDOMAIN.description: Subdomain for Jellyfin (web UI + Symfonium/Findroid/Streamyfin endpoint). Quick Connect handles mobile-app pairing — the app shows a 6-digit code, you confirm it once in the web UI (which can be SSO'd via jellyfin-plugin-sso if installed) and the app is paired without a shared password.

proxyConfig.advanced_config:
# Jellyfin needs a higher body limit for chunked uploads (cover
# art replacement, library imports). Default NPM cap of 1MB rejects
# those.
client_max_body_size 100M;
